title: Xenial Hearty Moroccan Beef Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Moroccan dish featuring tender beef and rich spices, perfect for a solo dinner, this recipe is designed to be ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and features hot beef stock and lardons-render for added depth of flavor
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat
Add the diced lardons and cook until crispy, then remove from pot
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for 1 minute
Add the beef cubes to the pot and cook until browned on all sides
Add the ground cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute
Add the hot beef stock to the pot and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro
